## Type of change

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`pytest` / `npm run build`)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in code
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new env vars added
- [ ] Alembic migration created for any model changes
- [ ] CORS / allowed origins updated if new service added
- [ ] Reviewed for N+1 queries or missing DB indexes
